description_long: This object consists of two parallel metallic rails, each reinforced with visible rivets, running the length of the structure. The rails are supported by four evenly spaced, rectangular wooden sleepers that are perpendicular to the rails, providing stability and alignment. The metallic rails have a slightly weathered, industrial appearance, while the wooden sleepers display a natural grain texture and a light brown color. There is no ballast bed or gravel beneath the sleepers, and the structure is not embedded in any pavement. The object is compact, likely representing a short segment of railway track, and there are no additional features such as signage or electrical components. The overall construction suggests durability and is typical of railway infrastructure found in urban or industrial environments.
description: A short segment of railway track with two metal rails and four wooden sleepers, showing detailed textures and industrial rivets. The structure is freestanding, with no ballast or pavement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ends of the four wooden sleepers protruding beyond the metal rails, with rivet details visible on the rail faces.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the wooden sleepers and the parallel alignment of the metal rails, with the sleepers' grain texture clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, again showing the ends of the wooden sleepers and the riveted metal rails.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, emphasizing the sleepers' arrangement and the rails' parallel structure.
